title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOCSIN, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2972 / 65 OG No. 8, 1817 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4994, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOCSIN, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Locsin, Province of Albay, is changed to Municipality of Daraga.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
